name: TECOGEN INC.
summary: Our Company Tecogen Inc., a Delaware corporation (together with its subsidiaries "we", "our", "us", "Tecogen," or "Company") produces commercial and industrial, natural-gas-fueled engine-driven, combined heat and power (CHP) products that reduce energy costs, decrease greenhouse gas emissions and alleviate congestion on the national power grid. Our products supply electric power or mechanical power for cooling, while heat from the engine is recovered and purposefully used at a customer facility....
